title: Teleshopping
desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Chasing
desc: A police officer saves a girl from being kidnapped and later looks into her failed abduction. Although the motive for the crime initially seems unclear, the clues soon lead her to a drug mafia.

title: Veera The Power
desc: Porus, a strong-minded IPS aspirant from a middle-class family in Chennai, comes across a series of dark secrets while investigating his sister's murder.

title: Bhimaa
desc: After some mysterious instances at a temple of historical significance, a detective visits the region to investigate and find out the truth behind the incidents.

title: Dabangg
desc: Chulbul Pandey, a police officer, battles a corrupt political leader, Cheddi Singh, who strains Chulbul's relationship with his step-brother.

title: Barood
desc: Jai, an honest police officer, falls in love with Neha, Mr Singhal's daughter. However, he suspects Mr Singhal to be a criminal and tries to catch him red-handed.
